As the Paris Olympics is abuzz with excitement, Shen Yanli, a talented paper-cutting artist from Huzhou in east China, infuses her unique flair into this global celebration of sportsmanship and athleticism. Her exquisite paper-cuttings showcase traditional designs like the "Mulberry Fish Dragon" and the 2024 Olympic mascot, Phryge, seamlessly blending Chinese and French elements. These worksare being showcased at iconic landmarks including the Arc de Triomphe and the Eiffel Tower by students from her hometown.
